requirements.text: Users must sign in using the national health identity account.
System must support three roles: patient, clinician, admin.
Clinicians must be able to create and update triage records with severity, symptoms, and priority.
Patients must be able to request, reschedule, and cancel appointments.
Appointment confirmations must include a reference code.
Appointment confirmation and cancellation notifications must be delivered within 10 minutes.
Admin dashboard must include daily appointment volume and no-show rate.
System must support 300 concurrent users during peak booking windows.
Critical pages must remain under 2.5 seconds at p95.
Monthly availability target must be at least 99.9%.

contradictions.statement_a: During network outages, emergency triage and patient lookup must still operate offline.
contradictions.statement_b: All user sessions must be validated against central cloud IAM in real time; offline access is not allowed.

contradictions.statement_a: Keep immutable clinical audit logs for 7 years.
contradictions.statement_b: Delete patient interaction logs after 30 days.
